exports.description: Render an interactive Leaflet map with a tile layer, pan/zoom, and optional markers. The component owns the container, sizing, and lifecycle.
exports.usage: Render `<LeafletMap center={[lat, lng]} zoom={2..20} />` when the intent names a rendered map (location browsing, route preview, points-of-interest grid). Optional `markers={[{ lat, lng, label? }]}` plot pins; optional `height` (default 400) sizes the map. Default tile layer is OpenStreetMap.

example.componentSnippet: function DeliveryMap({ center, deliveries }: Props) { return <LeafletMap center={center} zoom={12} markers={deliveries.map((d) => ({ id: d.id, lat: d.lat, lng: d.lng, label: d.label }))} />; }

exports.gotchas: The component owns map sizing (default 400px height; override with the `height` prop) and the full Leaflet lifecycle — just render `<LeafletMap center={[lat, lng]} zoom={n} />`. Do NOT import `leaflet` directly or hand-roll a container ref.
